title: Sanji Returns to Luffy
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Sanji, Luffy as Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the assassination plot against Big Mom begins taking shape.
scene: Sanji and Luffy reunite emotionally, turning the rescue mission into a direct conspiracy against Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: In conclusion, these are the three reasons...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Hurry up and cook us some- thing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Who picked at the Ingre- Dients?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I just can't find the strength to run away from here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once the ceremony begins, there's no way in hell I'll be able to stop every- thing on my own...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I somehow still want to save those scumbags...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That I don't even think of as my family!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns storyline with 29 dialogue beats. Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the crew joins Bege’s risky plan to attack Big Mom during the tea party.
